title: Weird Spinoff Ideas
wikitext:
[]: Weird Spinoff Ideas             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Sun Nov 30, 2008 2:21 pm This thread is exactly what it says on the tin. If you get a bizarre idea for a spinoff/fanfic, post it in here! Maybe someone will fanwank it in greater detail as a result. I'll start with an idea that came into my mind while I was watching Dai Mahou Touge: Magical Girl Lyrical Asuka Asuka gets magical girl powers. Hilarity ensues whenever she gets pissed at Shinji and attempts to rectify the situation by nuking him, rather than bitchslapping him like normal.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 30, 2008 2:31 pm I had a related bizarre dream a few years ago ... http://stevegilham.blogspot.com/2004/05/following-up.html

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sun Nov 30, 2008 2:49 pm Fresh Prince of Neo-Berlin : After getting into a fight, Toji is sent to live with his rich uncle Keel Lorenz in Germany. Hilarity ensues...until Keel gets sick of Toji's annoying antics and uses his soul to make one of the Mass Production Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Sun Nov 30, 2008 2:57 pm Lucretius wrote: Fresh Prince of Neo-Berlin : After getting into a fight, Toji is sent to live with his rich uncle Keel Lorenz in Germany. Hilarity ensues...until Keel gets sick of Toji's annoying antics and uses his soul to make one of the Mass Production Evas.

[]: Re: Weird Spinoff Ideas             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 30, 2008 3:34 pm SeanTucker wrote: Maybe someone will fanwank it in greater detail as a result.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Nov 30, 2008 7:44 pm Kensuke Aida, supernatural investigator. Give him a cute, geeky female partner and allow X Files-ish stuff to commence. Maybe he starts a paranormal club in high school or something and stumbles upon real ghosts, demons, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by jim_loves_randy » Mon Dec 01, 2008 3:12 am Toji tries to make the school's A-squad basketball team........ ......with one leg!!!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Mon Dec 01, 2008 1:13 pm Toji becomes a DDR champ with only one leg. Drama ensues . . . or comedy.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Dec 01, 2008 1:31 pm That's horrible. That said, let's have some wacky adventures with one-armed Rei and headless Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Mon Dec 01, 2008 1:47 pm I am thinking of something grand: a space opera set in the far future of Eva. Humanity has long since recovered from Third Impact and remembers it as the day when the truth was revealed. They now travel the stars, using their newfound knowledge of AT fields, souls, quantum, and other FAR sciences, discovering new worlds, interacting with Seeds of Life, meeting other Lillith-type aliens, and fighting (or taming) Adam type life, as they move forward on a mission to find the FAR themselves. Meanwhile, the protagonists are more interested in the legacy of old Earth and the almost mythical Children. They are after the knowledge that they gained from Third impact, the knowledge of what it even means to be human. That knowledge, unlike the sciences, is a forgotten one, and Shinji and the other Children have been elevated to the status of heroic saviors, rather than the flawed human beings that they are. All this is seen through the eyes of Humanities patron, Yui Ikari, as she floats gently, ready to tell her tale to any who wish to ask. She holds the key to the past, the key everyone needs if they want to find the answers they are looking for. Will they figure it out? Or will the culture that has so drifted from the truth let those who search for answers get away with it? P.S. See this FF.net thread. Very similar to this one.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Dec 01, 2008 2:12 pm That reminds me of some anime but for the life of me I can't recall which one (Galaxy Express maybe)? At any rate, I think this would be an interesting fanfic read if nothing else provided it's done right.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Mon Dec 01, 2008 2:48 pm I once suggested an Evangelion / Are You Being Served? crossover...

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Mon Dec 01, 2008 3:32 pm And that's why we love you.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Mon Dec 01, 2008 7:20 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: That reminds me of some anime but for the life of me I can't recall which one (Galaxy Express maybe)? At any rate, I think this would be an interesting fanfic read if nothing else provided it's done right.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Dec 01, 2008 7:30 pm I was thinking of a Twilight Zone/Evangelion crossover, using monkeys as a plot device, but then I realized that was just stupid.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Mon Dec 01, 2008 8:10 pm I'm actually tinkering with an odd NGE side-story sort of fic which uses elements from Storm Constantine's Grigori Trilogy. I don't know if it's brilliant or too way off in left field to share with the world, but I'm having fun tinkering with it.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Dec 01, 2008 8:51 pm Pulp Evangelion Fiction

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Dec 01, 2008 9:09 pm Evangelion of the Dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Mon Dec 01, 2008 9:20 pm 2015: A space anamoly The MAGI go crazy and a SEELE monolith is found on the moon

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Mon Dec 01, 2008 9:47 pm Razeil100 wrote: 2015: A space anamoly The MAGI go crazy and a SEELE monolith is found on the moon
